channel.title: Home on Sagar Sarkale
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Sagar Sarkale

item.title: It's LLaVA not lava!
item.description: LLaVA paper In this blog I try to break down some key points in the LLaVA research paper titled “Visual Instruction Tuning”, this is more of me exploring the paper and code/data associated with it and noting it down. LLaVA is a large multimodal model that is instruction-tuned to understand images and text. The authors present an end-to-end description of the procedure they follow to build this model. Additionally, with data used for training, they also open-source their model.

item.title: Log-Structured Merge Tree
item.description: An LSM Tree overview and Java implementation.
